```mermaid
graph LR
    classDef inference fill:#e3f2fd,stroke:#1565c0,color:#0d47a1;
    classDef toolUse fill:#fff3e0,stroke:#ef6c00,color:#e65100;
    classDef subagent fill:#f3e5f5,stroke:#6a1b9a,color:#4a148c;
    classDef skill fill:#e8f5e9,stroke:#2e7d32,color:#1b5e20;
    msg_c1_1_inf_0["T0: inf #1"]:::inference
    msg_c1_1_tu_tu_c1_r1["T0: Read"]:::toolUse
    msg_c1_2_inf_0["T1: inf #1"]:::inference
    msg_c1_2_tu_tu_c1_e1["T1: Edit"]:::toolUse
    msg_c1_3_inf_0["T2: inf #1"]:::inference
    msg_c1_3_tu_tu_c1_b1["T2: Bash"]:::toolUse

    msg_c1_1_inf_0 --> msg_c1_1_tu_tu_c1_r1
    msg_c1_2_inf_0 --> msg_c1_2_tu_tu_c1_e1
    msg_c1_3_inf_0 --> msg_c1_3_tu_tu_c1_b1
```
